_comment: Metal variant — warm bronze on armor slots, shadow on weapons and logos. Darker, grittier feel. Override specific slots to mix the two metals.

default_button._comment: See .bin/DEFAULTS.md: Slots Configuration > default_button. Uses button atlas row 1, col 1 with silver gradient.

default_item._comment: See .bin/DEFAULTS.md: Slots Configuration > default_item. Items tiled at 28px with slight transparency.
